description_long: This is a large, classic ocean liner-style yacht with a streamlined, elongated hull painted black with a red waterline accent. The superstructure is white and features four prominent cream-colored smokestacks evenly spaced along the centerline, evoking the iconic look of early 20th-century passenger ships like the RMS Titanic. Rows of yellow-lit windows line the hull, suggesting multiple decks and interior cabins. The bow and stern are sharply defined, with the bow coming to a pointed tip and the stern squared off. Two tall masts are positioned fore and aft, connected by cables, adding to the vessel's grandeur. The overall design is symmetrical and elegant, with clean lines and a strong visual presence.
description: A large, classic ocean liner-style yacht with a black hull, white superstructure, four cream smokestacks, and rows of yellow-lit windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central alignment of the smokestacks, and the symmetry of the hull.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the yacht, four smokestacks, rows of yellow-lit windows, and both masts with connecting cables.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the squared stern, the alignment of the smokestacks, and the aft mast.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the yacht's length, window rows, smokestacks, and masts.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, sharply pointed bow, squared stern, black hull with a red waterline accent, and rows of yellow-lit windows along the sides.
attribute_deck_layout: Single main deck with a raised superstructure, four evenly spaced smokestacks along the centerline, two tall masts fore and aft connected by cables, and rows of windows indicating multiple interior levels.
attribute_cabin_structure: Large, continuous superstructure with multiple rows of rectangular windows on both sides, suggesting several interior cabins; no exterior doors or balconies are visible.
